Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

I don't think we can hook the fsfreeze interface into obd_sync() since that will severely hurt performance for all kinds of normal uses, and not just the read-only operation in test-framework.

After tune2fs is run and modifies the superblock on the block device, why is it not enough to call fsync() on the block device directly, either (or both) from tune2fs as well as ldiskfs_label_lustre() after it is called.
